step_rationale: Ketone body marker of metabolic stress and ischemic burden; not plaque-specific mechanism.
mechanism: A ketone body that reflects metabolic stress and myocardial ischemic burden, signaling energy metabolism dysregulation.

references.title: Silent Myocardial Infarction Revisited: Immuno-metabolic Mechanisms, Multimodal Biomarkers, and Translational Diagnostics.
The role of ketone bodies in oxidized LDL-induced cell proliferation and lipid accumulation of macrophages.
A metabonomic study of cardioprotection of ginsenosides, schizandrin, and ophiopogonin D against acute myocardial infarction in rats.
